_comment: Manifest of every mod jar / datapack that feeds the Pokedex. 'sourceRoot' is resolved relative to this file. Add a new jar/datapack: drop the file in the right folder, add one entry here, rerun `npm run extract`.

sources.label: Kazeran Eeveelutions
sources.notes: Corrected: adds a real 'Kazeran' form (own stats/types/abilities/moveset) to each of the 8 eeveelutions via species_additions, plus matching Eevee evolution entries - not cosmetic, initial classification missed species_additions files.

sources.label: MelloMons
sources.notes: Named 'RP' but carries a small amount of species data alongside its textures.

sources.label: Cobblemon + Digimod Spawn Together
sources.notes: Spawn-pool/dex-registration compatibility patch for Digimod - must load after digimod's own species.

sources.label: Laser's Additions
sources.notes: Rebalances moves/abilities on existing species (official and fakemon). Always applied last and wins field conflicts, per server owner's ruling.

sources.label: AllTheMons x MegaShowdown Radiants
sources.notes: Only touches species_features/species_feature_assignments (a cosmetic 'radiant' visual flag) - no stat/species content. Its base ATM x MSD pack is disabled on this server (see disabled list), so this remnant contributes nothing to the dex either way.

disabled.label: AllTheMons x MegaShowdown (full pack)
disabled.file: datapacks/z DO NOT ENABLE z [ATM x MSD - Credits Only].zip
disabled.reason: Explicitly marked DO NOT ENABLE by server owner - not active on the server.
